title: Glittery Garden Girls Jewelry Making Kit. Best Necklace Pendant & Bracelet Crafting Set with Glass Beads & Charms. Fashion Accessories, Arts Crafts Supplies. Birthday Gift
features: 💰 COMPLETE KIT INCLUDES 11 pendant trays, 11 glass cabochons, 4 beads, 5 necklace chains, 4 string necklaces, 1.75 yard cord, glue, 200+ image sheets and instructional guides.
🎁 MAKE FAMILY/FRIENDS PORTRAIT PENDANT - Personalize with printed photos that last. Prevent smearing/discoloration from laser/inkjet prints by laying the protection film before applying the glue.
🧴 SPECIAL PURPOSE CRAFT GLUE - acrylic resin based, with clear glass-like finishing that last. It is safe, odorless, and bond quickly to metal jewelry and glass.

💎 QUALITY & SAFETY TESTED - Compliant with children’s jewelry safety standard. Silver plated charms and necklaces guarantee professional results. Handmade Easter/Thanksgiving/Christmas/Valentine’s gifts to remind someone they are loved!

💝 SIMPLE STEP-BY-STEP instructions to create 9 necklaces and 2 bracelets. Keep adults, teens, tween and any kids age 8 and above entertained for hours! Cool craft project for summer school holidays, or to liven up a sleepover party.
description: Product Description Craft Projects for The Artist Within Endless fun, style and fashion With tons of materials to work with, and a large image collection of vintage flair, country flags, emoji and alphabets etc, each necklace and bracelet will be unique to its creator. Your happiness is what matters. Protection film included to prevent smear or discoloration from laser/inkjet prints. Include your family and friends photo in your pendant designs and gift it! Kit makes 3 mosaic coasters Personalized paracord bracelets making set with metal charms Kit makes 6 lovely felt succulent plushies and a display stand Fun pre-party activity craft kit. Makes 12 one-of-the-kind hats Woodland themed creature party kit - makes 16 hats and more Create 9 + 2 Necklaces and Bracelets with adorable glass pendants to wear and share At Glittery Garden , we create kits that bring amazing memories that will last a lifetime. Our DIY crafting sets are thoughtfully curated to cultivate creativity and foster fun! Super clear instructional guides to learn glass pendant and bracelet making techniques using the cheerful color knotting cords. Work great for developing children’s imagination, creativity, finger dexterity and hand-eye coordination. Crafting help kids build their self-esteem, confidence and motivation - they will be able to create something by themselves to gift to others. Crafted with premium quality accessories, the DIY kits help you to create professional-looking products that are great, and can even be sold! Complete kit come with: 11 silver plated pendant trays 11 clear glass gems 5 silver plated necklace chains 4 cord necklaces 4 beads & 2 bracelet cords Craft Crew’s Glamour Glue Transparent protection film 200+ collage images and Instructions
